title: Cuneiform Tablet #0848: Old Akkadian Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
